rebuild_reason: Site last updated April 2021. Uses jQuery, Revolution Slider (2015-2018 era), outdated Elementor patterns. Strong business fundamentals: 80-year history, A+ BBB, 4.3★/52 reviews, 24/7 service. No franchise — 100% local independent.
aesthetic_notes: Established, trustworthy, blue-collar expertise. 80 years in Concordia. Family-owned. Should feel like the most reliable business in town.
